name: @ntizar/design-system
description: Ntizar Aurora — Constellation. CSS-only design system, namespaced under .nz, with multi-skin runtime and 9 optional packs.

scripts.lint:design: npx --yes @google/design.md lint DESIGN.md && npx --yes @google/design.md lint skins/DESIGN.sunset.md && npx --yes @google/design.md lint skins/DESIGN.midnight.md && npx --yes @google/design.md lint skins/DESIGN.ocean.md && npx --yes @google/design.md lint skins/DESIGN.citrus.md
scripts.build:tailwind:skins: npx --yes @google/design.md tailwind skins/DESIGN.sunset.md > dist/tailwind.sunset.json && npx --yes @google/design.md tailwind skins/DESIGN.midnight.md > dist/tailwind.midnight.json && npx --yes @google/design.md tailwind skins/DESIGN.ocean.md > dist/tailwind.ocean.json && npx --yes @google/design.md tailwind skins/DESIGN.citrus.md > dist/tailwind.citrus.json
scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && npm run build:tailwind && npm run build:tailwind:skins && npm run build:dtcg
